戏剧性的标题，我知道，但最近有几个人问我使用什么扩展，通过分享我的列表，我了解到了更好的扩展，那么还有什么比利用互联网更好的方式来放大这些积极影响呢？😛。
让我们屏蔽所有的广告吧！网站看起来更干净，加载速度更快，窥探更少。这些是我在任何浏览器上安装的第一个扩展。
让我们阻止所有的反广告拦截器！现在很多网站都会试图让你关闭广告拦截程序，但是一旦你安装了Nano Defender，你就不再需要处理这个问题了。注意：要与uBlock Origin一起使用，我必须先经过几个额外的步骤。
让我们封锁所有的登录/付费墙！你是不是开始看到一种模式了？😛网络有时可能会充斥着重击。有了Hover&amp；Unpaywall，我就可以告别中等付费墙和期刊付费墙了。如果你是开放源码的粉丝，并且有额外的一分钟时间，那就来看看这个扩展吧。
有时候，当我在消费内容时，我会忍不住想看看别人是怎么说的。那是...。并不总是好的。让这些xkcd漫画来说明我的观点：
闭嘴在任何地方都禁用评论。当我信任一个平台的受众，足以阅读他们大脑中未经过滤的输出时，我只会启用对该站点的评论。有时我会马上把它关掉，💀。
有时，即使在所有这些清除之后，网站上的内容仍然难以阅读-有时是因为他们使用了时髦的字体，并将大小设置为8px，或者有时是因为有100万条其他文章建议，外加三个侧边栏，以及一个永远不会消失的令人讨厌的导航标题。在这种情况下，我只使用阅读器模式。
视频速度控制器允许您控制任何站点的播放速度。将默认速度设置为1.10倍，您浏览视频的速度将提高10%，甚至不会被注意到。或者，如果你和我一样属于另一端，而Youtube的2x跟不上你的节奏，那就把它设为2.5x+，以便尽可能快地听完冗长的独白。😼
通过挂起您不使用的选项卡，使Chrome使用的资源更少。启用此功能后，计算机运行起来会流畅得多，尤其是如果您是一个强制打开标签的人。
遇到一个有趣的兔子洞或网站，你真的很想去看看，但现在没有时间吗？使用Tab Snooze，它稍后会神奇地重新打开选项卡。
以前我经常使用Google Keep来保存片段和链接，并在我在网上阅读的内容中添加我自己的笔记，但现在我开始转向概念，因为它更有条理了。它们都有一个重要的特点，那就是它们都是跨平台的，这意味着我可以在手机上输入一个新的想法，然后在我的PC上充实这个概念。
这些天我很少使用FB，这在很大程度上要归功于这个扩展。我可以突然出现，分享一些有趣的东西，或者告诉人们不要在Messenger上给我发消息，而不会被无限的馈送吞噬。
我确实使用Twitter，这完全清理了界面。我是说，看看这段演示视频。
在Matej的推荐下，这个可爱的扩展清理了Gmail的用户界面，隐藏了令人讨厌的徽标。
启用WhatFont，将鼠标悬停在任何网站上的任何文本上，您将立即看到字体系列和其他文本属性！不再在开发工具😤中挖掘css。
当我想要快速了解站点正在使用的堆栈/工具时，我会使用这些工具。结果是非常基本的，所以如果我想更深入地挖掘，我只需要在谷歌上搜索一下就可以了。
每当我想从容不迫地阅读一篇长篇文章时，比如这篇关于建立与关系营销相适应的产品市场的指南，我就会使用EpubPress将其转换为.epub，稍后我可以在线下阅读，通常是在我的Kindle上。
A就是这样！这是我目前的单子。我很高兴发现你最喜欢的扩展--只需留下评论即可。想要更多酷玩意儿的清单，你可能想检查一下我的藏品。如果你想第一个知道我什么时候发布了有用的东西，你可以在Twitter上关注我。
note_en:
Dramatic title, I know, but lately I've had a few people ask me what extensions I use, and through sharing my list I've learnt of even better ones, so what better way to amplify these positive effects than to leverage the internet? 😛
   Let's block all the ads! Sites look cleaner, load waayy faster, and pry less. These are the first extensions I install on  any browser.
  Let's block all the anti-adblockers! Many sites these days will try to get you to turn off your adblocker, but once you set up  Nano Defender, you'll no longer have to deal with that. Note: To use alongside Ublock Origin, I had to go through a  few extra steps first.
  Let's block all the login/paywalls! Are you starting to see a pattern here? 😛 The web can be full of thrash sometimes. With  Hover &  Unpaywall, I can say goodbye to Medium and journal paywalls. If you're a fan of open source and have an extra minute to spend, check out this  extension instead.
  Sometimes when I'm consuming content, I'll be tempted to see what others are saying about it. That's... not always good. Let these xkcd comics illustrate my point:
     Shut Up disables comments everywhere. When I trust a platform's audience enough to read the unfiltered outputs from their brains, I enable comments for just that site. Sometimes I turn it back off immediately 💀
  Occasionally, even after all these purges, the content on a site will still be ridiculously hard to read- sometimes because they used a funky font and set the size to 8px, or sometimes because there are a million other article suggestions, plus three sidebars, plus an obnoxious navigation header that never goes away. In cases like these, I just use  Reader Mode.
    Video Speed Controller allows you to control the playback speed on any site. Set the default pace to 1.10x and you'll go through videos 10% faster without even noticing. Or if you're on other end of the spectrum like me, and Youtube's 2x doesn't match your pace, set it to 2.5x+ to get through lengthy monologues as fast as possible 😼
  Makes Chrome use less resources by suspending tabs you're not using. Computers run much more smoothly when this is enabled, especially if you're a compulsive tab opener.
  Ran into an interesting rabbit hole or website that you'd really like to check out, but don't have the time right now? Use  Tab Snooze, and it'll magically reopen the tabs later.
  I used to use  Google Keep heavily before, to save snippets and links and to add my own notes to the stuff I read online, but I've started moving towards  Notion these days, as it's a lot more organized. An important feature both have is that they're cross-platform, which means I can type out a fresh thought on my phone and flesh out the concept on my PC later.
  I rarely use FB these days, and that's in large part thanks to this extension. I can just pop in to share something interesting or to tell people NOT to message me on Messenger, without being sucked in by the infinite feed.
  I do use Twitter, and this completely cleans up the interface. I mean, just look at this demo video
     Recommended by  Matej, this lovely extension cleans up Gmail's UI and hides the obnoxious logo.
       Enable WhatFont, hover over any text on any site, and you'll instantly be shown the font family and other text properties! No more digging through CSS in Dev Tools 😤
  I use these when I want a quick overview of what stack/tools a site is using. The results are pretty basic though, so if I want to dig deeper I just end up googling it.
  Whenever I have a lengthy article that I want to take my time to read, like this guide on  Building product-market fit with relationship marketing , I use EpubPress to turn it into an .epub that I can later read offline, usually on my Kindle.
  Aand that's it! This is my list as of now. I'd be happy to discover your favorite extensions- just leave a comment. For more lists of cool stuff, you might want to check my   stash. To be the first to know when I post something useful, you can follow me on  Twitter.
title: 我离不开Chrome扩展
title_en: The Chrome Extensions I Can't Live Without

弗吉尼亚州泰森角--(商业连线)--8月。2020年11日--全球最大的独立上市商业智能公司MicroStrategy®Inc(Nasdaq：MSTR)今天宣布，该公司已购买21,454枚比特币，购买总价为2.5亿美元，包括手续费和开支。购买比特币加密货币是根据该公司此前在2020年7月28日发布2020年第二季度财报时宣布的双管齐下的配资策略进行的。
该公司今天宣布，已通过修改后的荷兰拍卖要约，对MicroStrategy最多2.5亿美元的A类普通股发起现金收购要约，这解决了第一个问题，即要求向股东返还一部分多余现金。通过收购21,454枚比特币，MicroStrategy解决了其资本配置战略的另一个方面，该战略要求在一项或多项另类投资或资产上投资至多2.5亿美元。
“我们对比特币的投资是我们新的资本配置战略的一部分，该战略寻求为我们的股东带来最大的长期价值，”MicroStrategy Inc.首席执行官迈克尔·J·塞勒(Michael J.Sayler)说。“这项投资反映了我们的信念，即比特币作为全球采用最广泛的加密货币，是一种可靠的价值储存方式，是一种比持有现金更具长期升值潜力的有吸引力的投资资产。自十多年前诞生以来，比特币已经成为全球金融体系的重要补充，具有对个人和机构都有用的特征。微战略已经承认比特币是一种可以优于现金的合法投资资产，并相应地将比特币作为其国库储备策略中的本金持有量。“。
塞勒先生继续说：“微战略公司花了几个月的时间商议确定我们的资本配置战略。我们决定在这个时候投资比特币，部分原因是影响经济和商业格局的宏观因素汇聚在一起，我们认为这些因素正在给我们的企业金库计划带来长期风险-这些风险应该积极应对。这些宏观因素包括新冠肺炎引发的经济和公共卫生危机，世界各地采取的史无前例的政府金融刺激措施(包括量化宽松)，以及全球政治和经济的不确定性。我们认为，这些因素和其他因素加在一起，很可能会对法定货币和许多其他传统资产类型的长期实际价值产生重大贬值影响，包括许多传统上作为公司国库业务一部分持有的资产。“。
在考虑潜在投资的各种资产类别时，MicroStrategy观察到比特币的独特属性，这些属性使其相信，投资比特币不仅可以提供一种合理的通胀对冲，而且还有可能获得比其他投资更高的回报。塞勒先生阐述了他的观点，“我们发现比特币的全球认可度、品牌认知度、生态系统活力、网络主导地位、架构弹性、技术效用和社区风气，都有力地证明了比特币作为一种资产类别对于那些寻求长期价值储存的人的优越性。比特币是数字黄金--比之前的任何货币都更硬、更强、更快、更聪明。我们预计它的价值将与技术进步、不断扩大的采用率以及在现代推动如此多类别杀手崛起的网络效应相伴而生。“。
作为商业智能领域的领先者，MicroStrategy在预测技术趋势方面已有30年的历史。MicroStrategy是首批涉足企业商业智能软件领域的公司之一。它是关系分析、网络智能和移动智能领域的先驱，最近发明了HyperIntelligence®-零点击洞察力，可以嵌入到应用程序中，使其更智能、更快、更强大。
2012年，塞勒撰写了“移动浪潮”(The Mobile Wave)一书，阐述了移动计算将对商业、消费者和政治行为产生的影响，以及苹果、谷歌、Facebook、亚马逊和Twitter崛起的影响。MicroStrategy认为，世界正在进入“虚拟浪潮”--由技术进步和COVID危机催生的产品、服务和流程的快速非物质化。MicroStrategy认为，在快速变化的市场需求中，数字化转型已经加快。这些动态促使许多公司重新考虑它们的产品、运营和系统，以及它们的资产负债表和财务战略。
微战略公司仍然把重点放在经营一家日益盈利的商业智能公司的公司战略上，为世界上一些最大、最受尊敬的机构提供服务。这一战略包括寻求
MicroStrategy(纳斯达克市场代码：MSTR)是全球最大的独立上市商业智能公司，拥有领先的企业分析平台。我们的愿景是实现智能无处不在的™。MicroStrategy在一个开放的、全面的企业平台上提供现代分析，财富全球500强中的许多世界上最受尊敬的品牌都在使用这个平台。该平台针对云和内部部署进行了优化，具有超智能功能，这是一项突破性技术，可将可操作的企业数据覆盖在流行的业务应用程序上，帮助用户做出更明智、更快速的决策。

本新闻稿包括可能构成“前瞻性陈述”的陈述，包括对未来业务前景和财务结果的估计、对比特币未来回报的预期、比特币的未来价值以及比特币在未来时期的特点和用途，以及含有“相信”、“估计”、“项目”、“预期”或类似表述的陈述。前瞻性陈述固有地涉及风险和不确定因素，可能导致MicroStrategy公司及其子公司(统称“公司”)的实际结果与前瞻性陈述大不相同。可能导致这种差异的因素包括：比特币的历史价格波动；在各种证券、商品和其他监管制度下对比特币的监管待遇的不确定性；如果比特币价格下跌，导致公司报告的资产和收益出现波动，公司收益可能出现重大减值费用；可能发生安全漏洞或其他网络攻击，导致公司比特币资产部分或全部损失；以及公司提交给证券和证券交易委员会的注册声明和定期报告中详细说明的其他风险。在本新闻稿发布之日之后，公司没有义务更新这些前瞻性陈述以进行修订或更改。

TYSONS CORNER, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Aug. 11, 2020--  MicroStrategy ® Incorporated (Nasdaq: MSTR), the largest independent publicly-traded business intelligence company, today announced that it has purchased 21,454 bitcoins at an aggregate purchase price of  $250 million, inclusive of fees and expenses. The purchase of Bitcoin cryptocurrency was made pursuant to the two-pronged capital allocation strategy previously announced by the company when it released its second quarter 2020 financial results on  July 28, 2020.
 The company addressed the first prong, which called for returning a portion of its excess cash to shareholders, when it announced today that it had launched a cash tender offer for up to  $250 million of MicroStrategy’s class A common stock via a modified Dutch Auction offer. By acquiring 21,454 bitcoins,  MicroStrategy addressed the other prong of its capital allocation strategy, which called for investing up to  $250 million in one or more alternative investments or assets.
 “Our investment in Bitcoin is part of our new capital allocation strategy, which seeks to maximize long-term value for our shareholders,” said  Michael J. Saylor, CEO,  MicroStrategy Incorporated. “This investment reflects our belief that Bitcoin, as the world’s most widely-adopted cryptocurrency, is a dependable store of value and an attractive investment asset with more long-term appreciation potential than holding cash. Since its inception over a decade ago, Bitcoin has emerged as a significant addition to the global financial system, with characteristics that are useful to both individuals and institutions.  MicroStrategy has recognized Bitcoin as a legitimate investment asset that can be superior to cash and accordingly has made Bitcoin the principal holding in its treasury reserve strategy.”
 Mr. Saylor continued, “MicroStrategy spent months deliberating to determine our capital allocation strategy. Our decision to invest in Bitcoin at this time was driven in part by a confluence of macro factors affecting the economic and business landscape that we believe is creating long-term risks for our corporate treasury program ― risks that should be addressed proactively. Those macro factors include, among other things, the economic and public health crisis precipitated by COVID-19, unprecedented government financial stimulus measures including quantitative easing adopted around the world, and global political and economic uncertainty. We believe that, together, these and other factors may well have a significant depreciating effect on the long-term real value of fiat currencies and many other conventional asset types, including many of the assets traditionally held as part of corporate treasury operations.”
 In considering various asset classes for potential investment,  MicroStrategy observed distinctive properties of Bitcoin that led it to believe investing in the cryptocurrency would provide not only a reasonable hedge against inflation, but also the prospect of earning a higher return than other investments.  Mr. Saylor articulated the opinion, “We find the global acceptance, brand recognition, ecosystem vitality, network dominance, architectural resilience, technical utility, and community ethos of Bitcoin to be persuasive evidence of its superiority as an asset class for those seeking a long-term store of value. Bitcoin is digital gold – harder, stronger, faster, and smarter than any money that has preceded it. We expect its value to accrete with advances in technology, expanding adoption, and the network effect that has fueled the rise of so many category killers in the modern era.”
 A leader in the business intelligence space,  MicroStrategy has a 30-year history of anticipating technology trends.  MicroStrategy was one of the first companies in the enterprise business intelligence software sector. It was a pioneer in Relational Analytics, Web Intelligence, and Mobile Intelligence and has most recently invented HyperIntelligence ® – zero click insights that can be embedded in applications to make them smarter, faster, and stronger.
 In 2012,  Mr. Saylor wrote “The Mobile Wave,” addressing the impact mobile computing would have on business, consumer, and political behavior and the implications of the rise of Apple, Google, Facebook, Amazon, and Twitter.  MicroStrategy believes the world is entering “The Virtual Wave” – a rapid dematerialization of products, services, and processes enabled by advances in technology and catalyzed by the COVID crisis.  MicroStrategy believes digital transformation has quickened amid rapidly shifting market requirements. These dynamics have many corporations rethinking their offerings, operations, and systems, as well as their balance sheets and financial strategies.
 “MicroStrategy remains focused on its corporate strategy of operating a growing profitable business intelligence company, serving some of the largest most respected institutions worldwide. This strategy includes seeking to grow its revenue through its HyperIntelligence, Cloud Intelligence, and Embedded Intelligence offerings, a refreshed go-to-market focused on simplified products and pricing, and a cloud-first platform-as-a-service focus. MicroStrategy’s goal of generating long-term operating income and free cash flow has also led it to adopt a new capital allocation strategy.  MicroStrategy believes that buying  $250 million in Bitcoin will provide it the opportunity to earn better returns and preserve the value of our capital over time compared to holding cash. Our corporate strategy and two-pronged capital allocation strategy are designed to benefit shareholders, customers, partners, and employees,” said  Phong Le, President & CFO,  MicroStrategy Incorporated.
  MicroStrategy (Nasdaq: MSTR) is the largest independent publicly-traded business intelligence company, with the leading enterprise analytics platform. Our vision is to enable Intelligence Everywhere ™.  MicroStrategy provides modern analytics on an open, comprehensive enterprise platform used by many of the world’s most admired brands in the Fortune Global 500. Optimized for cloud and on-premises deployments, the platform features HyperIntelligence, a breakthrough technology that overlays actionable enterprise data on popular business applications to help users make smarter, faster decisions.
 MicroStrategy, HyperIntelligence, and Intelligence Everywhere are either trademarks or registered trademarks of  MicroStrategy Incorporated in  the United States and certain other countries. Other product and company names mentioned herein may be the trademarks of their respective owners.
 This press release includes statements that may constitute “forward-looking statements,” including estimates of future business prospects and financial results, expectations as to future returns on Bitcoin, the future value of Bitcoin, and the characteristics and utility of Bitcoin in future periods, and statements containing the words “believe,” “estimate,” “project,” “expect,” or similar expressions. Forward-looking statements inherently involve risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results of  MicroStrategy Incorporated and its subsidiaries (collectively, the “Company”) to differ materially from the forward-looking statements. Factors that could contribute to such differences include: the historical price volatility of Bitcoin; uncertainty regarding the regulatory treatment of Bitcoin under various securities, commodities, and other regulatory regimes; the potential for significant impairment charges to the Company’s earnings in the event of a decrease in the price of Bitcoin and resulting volatility in the Company’s reported assets and earnings; the potential for security breaches or other cyberattacks that could result in a partial or total loss of the Company’s Bitcoin assets; and other risks detailed in the Company’s registration statements and periodic reports filed with the  Securities and Exchange Commission. The Company undertakes no obligation to update these forward-looking statements for revisions or changes after the date of this release.
